title: Senior Software Engineer - Urban Company Digital Technologies - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Urban Company Digital Technologies - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Urban Company Digital Technologies. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Software Engineer to strengthen our Nashik-based team.

About Urban Company Digital Technologies:
Urban Company Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in CI/CD

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Urban Company Digital Technologies!
